Outside chrome that must not appear
Navigation controls
Table of contents controls
Edit History Tags Source
Rating widget
Wikidot page info controls

SCP-999

Main article text with an internal link, an external link, a namespace link, a same-site unlisted link, a local jump, a javascript link, and mail contact.

Threat rating: green.

Rating note is article content.

« SCP-002 | SCP-003 | SCP-004 »

Outside footer that must not appear
